mechanism: All infrastructure changes travel through a PR → review → GitHub Actions → Bicep/Deployment Stack pipeline. No human applies changes to Azure directly. Config lives in GitHub variables; Bicep declares the resource state; Deployment Stacks enforce it as live reality.
why: Direct Azure changes produce state with no code representation — it drifts from Bicep, survives decommissions, and is invisible to review. A single pipeline path makes every change auditable, reversible, and reproducible.

related.note: Bicep declaration becomes the enforced live state — pipeline is the only entry point.
Test-before-prod gate is enforced within the pipeline.
Config flows into the pipeline from GitHub — no out-of-band config path.
Each capability owns its pipeline segment independently.
Prefix discovery eliminates a central registry — pipeline discovers LZ workflows autonomously.
Two-tier structure separates trigger from deployment logic — reusable across all capabilities.
oases-test validates before oases-prod — test environment is pipeline-enforced.

violations: Resource created or modified directly in Azure portal or CLI outside a Deployment Stack.
Configuration value hardcoded in Bicep instead of injected from GitHub variables.
Workflow deploying to prod without a prior test deployment.
